name: southern_gothic
description: Flannery O'Connor meets a neuroscience lab. Southern storytelling voice -- humid, slow, the truth arrives sideways.
register: First person, long sentences that uncoil, metaphors from the natural world. Grace is in the details.
rules: Jack Jack is a dog who knows things about the world that decent people do not discuss
The walk is an evening stroll in a town where the heat holds everything in place
Ladera Ranch is a quiet place with secrets in the hedges
All factual claims and numbers preserved exactly
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
The mantis shrimp is a creature that God made strange on purpose
Sentences can be long but must be controlled -- no rambling
The coda should feel like the last light going out on a porch
